recommended.empty: No recommendations right now — your workspace is well covered.

performance.empty: Performance metrics appear after skills are active.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Discover and install Skills, Business Packs, Knowledge Packs, and governed extensions.
marketplace.principle: Every item declares permissions, risk level, and deployment compatibility before installation.
marketplace.catalogSubtitle: Browse official Aipify packs and extensions.
marketplace.installedSubtitle: Manage installed packs — disable or uninstall safely.
marketplace.approvalRequired: Approval required — confirm governance review and try again with approval.
marketplace.openMarketplaceGovernance: Open Marketplace Governance (Phase 90) for quality review

marketplaceSelfService.subtitle: Discover, purchase, and activate Aipify capabilities directly from your workspace — Aipify grows with your business.
marketplaceSelfService.errorMessage: Aipify could not complete this operation right now. The issue has been logged for review.
marketplaceSelfService.activationSuccess: Business Pack activated. Your workspace has been refreshed — no logout required.
marketplaceSelfService.trialSuccess: Trial started. Explore the workspace at your own pace.
marketplaceSelfService.emptyRecommendedMessage: Aipify surfaces relevant opportunities as your business grows.
marketplaceSelfService.emptyDiscoverMessage: Check back as new capabilities become available for your workspace.
marketplaceSelfService.emptyInstalledMessage: Discover and activate Aipify Hosts, Commerce, Support, Executive, or Growth from the Discover tab.
marketplaceSelfService.emptyTrialsMessage: Eligible Business Packs with trial options appear here.

businessPackMarketplace.subtitle: Discover, evaluate, install, upgrade, and manage Aipify Business Packs — the growth engine of your operating system.
businessPackMarketplace.errorMessage: We could not load the Business Pack Marketplace. Please try again.
businessPackMarketplace.emptyRecommendedMessage: Install your first Business Pack to receive tailored recommendations.
businessPackMarketplace.emptyInstalledMessage: Browse the catalog below to expand your operational capabilities.

businessPackMarketplaceInstall.notFoundMessage: This Business Pack is not available for installation.
businessPackMarketplaceInstall.installSubtitle: Choose license, accept terms, select languages, review permissions, then activate — Paid = Access Now.
businessPackMarketplaceInstall.legalRequiredMessage: You must accept the Terms & Conditions and License Agreement before activating this pack.

businessPackMarketplaceEngine.title: Business Pack Marketplace Engine
businessPackMarketplaceEngine.subtitle: Unified marketplace infrastructure — discover, install, upgrade, and govern all Business Packs.

appEcosystem.title: App Ecosystem
appEcosystem.subtitle: Install and manage governed extensions — Skills, packs, widgets, and integrations.
appEcosystem.principle: Apps are guests inside Aipify — permission-aware, sandboxed, and auditable.
appEcosystem.safetyNote: Third-party apps run in Sandbox Runtime with no secret or cross-tenant access.
appEcosystem.governanceNote: Install requests are validated by Policy Engine. High-risk apps require Governance approval.

marketplaceGovernance.title: Marketplace Governance
marketplaceGovernance.subtitle: Protect quality, trust, and sustainability in your commerce environment — with human oversight for every high-impact action.
marketplaceGovernance.automatedActionsEnabled: Automated governance actions are enabled — products may be hidden per policy.
marketplaceGovernance.automatedActionsDisabled: Automated actions disabled — Aipify provides alerts and recommendations only.

globalEcosystemMarketplaceEngine.title: Global Solution Marketplace
globalEcosystemMarketplaceEngine.subtitle: Global Intelligence Era (141–150) — professional enterprise solution exchange. Governed discovery of playbooks, frameworks, and Growth Partner offerings. NOT a consumer app store — cross-link skills, companion, and module marketplaces only.
globalEcosystemMarketplaceEngine.engineTitle: Global Ecosystem Marketplace & Solution Exchange Engine (Phase 148)
globalEcosystemMarketplaceEngine.distinctionNote: Professional exchange for enterprise organizations — not consumer app store dynamics.
globalEcosystemMarketplaceEngine.optInRequired: Opt-in required — marketplace participation is disabled until your organization enables the center.
globalEcosystemMarketplaceEngine.approvalRequired: Executive approval required before solution listings are published globally.
globalEcosystemMarketplaceEngine.crossLinks: Related surfaces — cross-link only, do not duplicate
globalEcosystemMarketplaceEngine.companionLimitations: Companion limitations — no outcome guarantees or procurement override

phase148.mission: Enable professional enterprise solution exchange — governed discovery with procurement metadata.
phase148.philosophy: People First. Share wisdom responsibly — Growth Partner, never Affiliate.
phase148.professionalExchange: Professional exchange — not consumer app store dynamics.

commerceCompanion.title: Commerce Companion
commerceCompanion.subtitle: Your unified daily commerce Companion — holistic visibility, morning briefings, and cross-module stewardship without reactive pressure.
commerceCompanion.pressureFreeMode: Pressure-free mode active — stewardship not urgency
commerceCompanion.selfLoveConnection: Self Love connection — sustainable commerce pacing

moduleMarketplaceFoundationEngine.title: Module Marketplace
moduleMarketplaceFoundationEngine.subtitle: Modular SaaS catalog, tenant activation, dependencies, and configuration.

marketplacePartnerEcosystemFoundationEng.title: Partner Ecosystem
marketplacePartnerEcosystemFoundationEng.subtitle: Discover, activate, and benefit from ecosystem extensions — packs, connectors, knowledge, and governed partner offerings.
marketplacePartnerEcosystemFoundationEng.industryPacksNote: Industry-specific patterns cross-linked to Industry Intelligence — metadata examples for Support, Commerce, Healthcare, and Education.
marketplacePartnerEcosystemFoundationEng.connectorMarketplaceNote: Modular integrations cross-linked to Integration Engine — activate connectors without replacing customer systems.

appStore.title: App Store
appStore.subtitle: Discover, purchase, install, upgrade, and manage Business Packs for your workspace.
appStore.principle: APP discovers. APP buys. APP activates. Aipify delivers instantly.
appStore.governanceNote: APP owner controls employee module visibility after install — employees inherit access only when granted.
appStore.emptyTitle: No Business Packs in this section
appStore.emptyDescription: Browse the Marketplace to discover operational packs for your organization.
appStore.installCompleteHint: Configure employee access in Module Access settings.
appStore.removeWarning: This pack and its modules will become unavailable. Historical data will be retained according to Aipify retention policies.

licenseDashboard.title: License Dashboard
licenseDashboard.subtitle: Current plan, Business Pack licenses, seat consumption, and renewal status.
licenseDashboard.principle: APP owns licenses. Employees inherit access when APP owner grants module visibility.
licenseDashboard.emptyDescription: Install Business Packs from the App Store to extend your workspace.
